2026-04-23T02:55:35.4982831Z [36;1m# Derive GH_HOST from GITHUB_SERVER_URL so the gh CLI targets the correct[0m
2026-04-23T02:55:35.4985459Z [36;1m# GitHub instance (GHES/GHEC). On github.com this is a harmless no-op.[0m
